info.title: Inlanefreight E-Commerce Marketplace
info.description:
Inlanefreight E-Commerce Marketplace API Specification.
Maintained by superadmin@inlanefreight.htb.
In case you find any vulnerabilities, please respect the Responsible Disclosure process and send us an email with the information and the steps to reproduce.
We don't pay bug bounties, but BIG bounties.

patch.description:
The Supplier performing the update must be a staff of the Company.
Role(s) required: SupplierCompanies_Update

get.summary: Gets all Supplier Companies
Gets a Supplier Company Yearly Report
Gets a Supplier's Company Certificate of Incorporation as Base64-encoded data
Gets the Supplier Company of the currently authenticated Supplier
Gets all Supplier Companies Yearly Reports
Gets a Supplier Company
Get the roles of the currently authenticated user
get.description:
Use this endpoint to get the roles of the currently authenticated user.
Role(s) required: None

get.summary: Gets the number of Suppliers by name
Gets a Supplier Quarterly Report by ID
Gets a Supplier
Gets all Supplier Quarterly Reports
Gets all Suppliers
Gets a Supplier
Gets a the total count of Products having a substring in their name

post.description:
Use this endpoint to upload the Photo for Products in PNG format. The Product must be created by the Supplier uploading the photo for it.
Upon submission, the PNG files are stored on disk indefinitely; we must make sure that Inlanefreight informs the Suppliers about this storage policy. Additionally, the Privacy Officer should ensure that this information is accurately reflected in the Privacy Policy.
Role(s) required: Products_UploadPhoto

patch.summary: Updates a Product using the Supplier ID of the currently authenticated Supplier
patch.description:
A Product can be only updated by the Supplier that created it.
Role(s) required: None

post.summary: Creates a new Product using the Supplier ID of the currently authenticated Supplier

patch.description:
A Product can be updated only by the Supplier that created it.
Role(s) required: Products_Update

get.summary: Gets all Products. By default, only Customers are allowed to use this endpoint. Suppliers should use instead /api/v1/products/current-supplier-company
Gets a Product's Photo as Base64
Gets all Products belonging to the Company of the currently authenticated Supplier. Customers should use instead /api/v1/products
Gets a Product
Gets all Product Discounts
Gets the Discounts of a Product
Gets the Customer data of the currently authenticated Customer
Gets all Customers
Gets a Customer
Gets all Customer Payment Options of the currently authenticated Customer
Gets all Customer Payment Options
Gets all Customer Payment Options by Customer ID

post.summary: Uploads a Supplier's Company Certificate of Incorporation
post.description:
Use this endpoint to upload the Certificate of Incorporation for Supplier Companies in PDF format. The Supplier performing the upload must be a staff of the Company.
Upon submission, the PDF files are stored on disk indefinitely; we must make sure that Inlanefreight informs Supplier Companies about this storage policy. Additionally, the Privacy Officer should ensure that this information is accurately reflected in the Privacy Policy.
Role(s) required: SupplierCompanies_UploadCertificateOfIncorporation

get.summary: Gets all Items of a Customer Order
Gets all Customer Orders by Customer ID
Gets all Customer Orders of the currently authenticated Customer
Gets all Customer Orders

post.summary: Creates a new Customer Order using the ID of the currently authenticated Customer

get.summary: Gets a Customer Order

post.summary: Adds new Item(s) in a Customer Order
post.description:
After the customer adds items through the front end, we process the transaction and charge the customer based on the NetSum field in the database, which should be calculated by a trigger.
Role(s) required: CustomerOrderItems_Create

get.summary: Gets all Customer Billing Addresses by Customer ID and City
Gets all Customer Billing Addresses by Customer ID
Gets all Customer Billing Addresses of the currently authenticated Customer
Gets all Customers Billing Addresses

post.summary: Creates a new Customer Billing Address
Sends a password-reset OTP to a Customer's email
post.description:
This endpoint sends an OTP via email to the Customer's email address when they want to reset their password.
Role(s) required: None

post.summary: Signs in a Supplier and returns a JWT
post.description: Use this endpoint to sign with the credentials of a Supplier

post.summary: Signs in a Customer and returns a JWT
post.description: Use this endpoint to sign with the credentials of a Customer

post.summary: Sends a password-reset OTP to a Customer's phone number
post.description:
This endpoint sends an OTP via SMS to the Customer's phone number when they want to reset their password.
The SMS provider we are working with charges us a significant amount per message. We need to request a discount from them; otherwise, our revenues will decrease.
Role(s) required: None

Use this endpoint to confirm resetting a Customer's password. The OTP sent via email or SMS must be supplied.
OTPs are valid for only 5 minutes.
Role(s) required: None

JWTBearerAuth.description: Enter a JWT token to authorize the requests...
